description_long: This sculpture features a realistic human head emerging from the top of a tall, rectangular pedestal. The head is finely detailed, with distinct facial features and a calm expression, while the body is abstracted into a rough, monolithic column. The pedestal is mounted on a square base, which appears to be made of the same material as the rest of the sculpture. The surface of the column is textured and uneven, contrasting with the smoothness of the head. There is a plaque or inscription visible on the front of the base, suggesting commemorative or informational content. The overall appearance is somber and monumental, suitable for public display in an urban environment.
description: A realistic human head rises from a rough, rectangular column atop a square base, with a visible plaque on the front. The sculpture combines detailed portraiture with an abstract, monolithic form.
description_view_0: The front view shows the detailed human head, the textured column, and a plaque on the base.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the profile of the head and the depth of the column, with the base clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back of the head and the column, with no visible plaque or facial features.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the opposite profile of the head and the rough surface of the column.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure bust on a monolithic pedestal
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be designed for outdoor installation, likely in a public urban space such as a plaza or park.
